wood.goal: Get wood, craft a crafting table and stone pickaxe before nightfall.
wood.how_to: Find a tree. Hold left-click on log blocks (trunk). 4 logs → 16 planks → crafting table. Open crafting table (right-click), craft: wooden pickaxe (3 planks top row + 2 sticks center column). Then mine 3 stone blocks → stone pickaxe. Milestone: stone pickaxe in hand.
tips: Chop the bottom log — upper logs fall and auto-collect
Leaves sometimes drop saplings (replant later)
Crafting table opens with right-click
If night comes before shelter: pillar up 6 blocks and wait on top

stone.goal: Stone tools, food, torches. Survive nights. Find iron ore underground.
stone.how_to: Mine cobblestone with wooden pickaxe. Kill animals (cow/pig/sheep/chicken) with sword — left-click. Cook meat in furnace. Find coal ore (grey with black flecks) on cave walls or at Y<40. Coal + stick = torch. Dig down or find a cave to explore for iron.
tips: Never dig straight down — fall risk
Caves are faster than shaft mining for finding iron
Coal ore looks like grey stone with dark flecks
Iron ore is grey stone with orange/tan flecks
Craft a sword early: 2 cobblestone (vertical) + 1 stick below

key_crafting.furnace: 8 cobblestone around crafting grid (leave center empty)

iron.goal: Mine and smelt iron. Craft iron pickaxe, sword, and armor.
iron.how_to: Iron ore spawns at Y=15–50. Mine with stone pickaxe minimum. Smelt in furnace: put iron ore in top slot, coal/wood in bottom slot. Need ~24 ingots for pickaxe + sword + chestplate. Then dig deeper (below Y=16) for diamonds.
tips: Iron ore has orange/tan flecks on grey stone
Furnace: ore goes in top slot, fuel goes in bottom slot
Lava pools often appear at Y<11 — bring water bucket
Iron armor: helmet=5, chestplate=8, leggings=7, boots=4 ingots
Y=15 is the sweet spot — iron generates heavily here

diamond.goal: Find diamonds at Y=-58 to Y=16. Craft tools. Build Nether portal.
diamond.how_to: Strip mine at Y=-58 east-west with tunnels every 3 blocks. Need iron pickaxe to mine diamond ore. Watch for lava — place water to neutralize. After getting 12+ diamonds: craft pickaxe + sword. Collect 10 obsidian (iron or diamond pickaxe near lava + water). Craft flint and steel. Build 4-wide × 5-tall obsidian frame, light it.
tips: Diamond ore is grey stone with blue/cyan flecks
Never mine diamond ore adjacent to lava without checking sides first
Obsidian forms when water touches lava source block
Nether portal frame: 4 wide × 5 tall (corners optional = only needs 10 obsidian)
Flint: mine gravel until it drops flint. Flint + iron ingot = flint & steel
Enchant diamond pickaxe with Fortune III to multiply gem drops

nether.goal: Find Nether Fortress. Collect 6 blaze rods + 12 ender pearls.
nether.how_to: Enter portal. Nether Fortress = large dark nether brick structure (look for it across lava lakes or on cliffs). Blazes spawn on cage spawners inside — kill for blaze rods. Endermen spawn in open nether wastes and warped forests — kill for ender pearls. Return to Overworld when you have enough.
tips: Fortresses generate in strips along the Z axis — travel east or west to find one
Blazes fire fireballs — wear armor, bring potions of fire resistance if possible
Gold armor makes piglins neutral (they won't attack you)
Piglin bartering: throw gold ingots at piglins for ender pearls and other items
Ghast fireballs can be deflected by hitting them back
Bridge over lava with cobblestone or netherack

end.goal: Locate stronghold with Eyes of Ender. Enter The End. Kill Ender Dragon.
end.how_to: Throw Eye of Ender (right-click) — it flies toward the stronghold. Follow it. When it flies downward, dig. Find the End Portal room (3×3 portal frame blocks). Fill all 12 frame blocks with Eyes of Ender. Jump in. In The End: shoot End Crystals on obsidian pillars with bow first. Then attack dragon with sword when it perches on the fountain portal.
tips: Bring 12 Eyes of Ender for the portal (may use 1-2 finding it)
End Crystals heal the dragon — destroy all of them before engaging
Dragon is immune to arrows except when perched on portal
Beds explode in The End — can be placed near portal as a weapon
Carry golden apples and good armor
The dragon fight ends when the death animation plays — XP fountains up
